title: Baiwwa USB C Charger Cable 1.5m, 2Pack USB Type C Cable, 3.1A Fast Charger Cable Type C Phone Charging Lead for Samsung Galaxy S24 S23 S22 S21 S20 S10 Plus, A55 A54 A53 A15 A14 A70 A71 -White
features: 【2 Pack Practical & Convenient】This set includes two 1.5 meter white Baiwwa usb-a to usb-c cable, providing a reliable charging solution for your home, car, or on the go
【Fast Charging & Data Sync】This usb c charger cable supports up to 3A fast charging and data transfer speeds of up to 480 Mbps
【Built-in Circuit Protection】This usb to usb c cable features a built-in 56KΩ pull-up resistor, aiding in the regulation of current flow to support secure charging connections

【Flexible & Tangle-Free】This usbc charger cable fast charging 1.5 m features nylon braiding and aluminum housing. It is rigorously tested to withstand 35,000+ bends, supporting long-lasting performance

【Multi-Device Support】This Baiwwa usb c lead is compatible with many USB-C phones, tablets, and laptops, including iPhone 15/15 Plus/15 Pro/15 Pro Max, 16/16 Plus/16 Pro/16 Pro Max; Samsung Galaxy S25/s24/S23/S22/S21/S20/S10/S9/S8 Series, Galaxy A Series, Pixel Series, and more
description: Durable Nylon Braided USB-A to USB-C Cable Brand : Baiwwa Length : 1.5 meter Pack : 2 Pack Color : White Port: USB A to USB C Product Details： ① Charging Support: Supports 3.1A Fast Charging ② Data transfer: Speed up to 480Mbps (USB 2.0) ③ Material: Enhanced Durability with 24-strand braid Nylon Braided, TPE jacket, Aluminum housing, and firm metal connectors Usage Tips： ① This is a USB-A to USB-C cable. It is not USB-C to USB-C or Micro USB ② For optimal fast charging performance, a compatible fast-charging power adapter and device are required ③ It supports standard charging but is not compatible with certain proprietary fast-charging protocols (e.g., iPhone Fast Charging, HUAWEI SuperCharge, OnePlus Dash Charge) Compatibility listi： For Samsung: Galaxy S10 S9 S8 S20 S21 S22 S23 S24 S25 S10+ S9+ S8+ S20+ S21+ S22+ S23+ S24+ S25+ Galaxy Note 20 20+ 20 Ultra 10 10+ 9 8 Galaxy A21 A21s A20S A30s A31 A50s A70S A90 A81 A80 A71 A70 A51 A50 A40 A51 A52 A53 A54 A55 A56 A16 A15 A14 A13 A12 A11 A10 For iPhone: 15 15plus 15pro 15pro max 16 16plus 16pro 16pro max For Pixel: 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 9 10 10a 9a 8a 4a 3a 2a XL 2XL 3XL 4XL For Xperia: 1 5 10 Plus L1 2 3 XA1 XA2 XZ Premium XZ1 XZ2 XZ3 For Moto: G8 G6 G6 Plus,G7 G7 Play, G7 Power Z Z2 Z3 Z4 Play For LG: G8 G7 G6 G5 V50 V40 V35 V30 V30+ V20 Q7 Q7+Thinq K51 Stylo 6 5 And Other USB-C devices
